name: reverse-engineering
description: Multi-platform reverse engineering toolkit. Bundles Ghidra / radare2 / JADX / apktool / Frida / GDB / LLDB MCP servers, an orchestration agent, and per-target skills (PE/ELF/Mach-O, raw firmware blobs incl. MIPS/ARM/Cortex-M/PowerPC/68k/SuperH/RISC-V, APK, iOS, Frida instrumentation, GDB/LLDB single-step debugging, crackme).

GHIDRA_INSTALL_DIR.title: Ghidra install directory
GHIDRA_INSTALL_DIR.description: Directory containing analyzeHeadless / ghidraRun. Required by the ghidra MCP server. Leave empty to fall back to the GHIDRA_INSTALL_DIR env var.

ARTIFACT_DIR.title: Artifact output directory
ARTIFACT_DIR.description: Where reports and intermediate analysis go. Resolved relative to the agent's current working directory at run time. Defaults to artifacts/re-runs.
